ogTitle: Huntleys Cove vs Huonbrook: Climate Safety

heading: Huntleys Cove vs Huonbrook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Huntleys Cove, New South Wales and Huonbrook, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Huntleys Cove has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Huonbrook (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Huntleys Cove or Huonbrook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Huntleys Cove has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Huonbrook scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Huntleys Cove scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Huonbrook scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Huntleys Cove or Huonbrook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Huntleys Cove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
